rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same core documentation overclaims (ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup docstrings and unipotentRadical_trivial' vs. : True stubs). Review 1's extra finding on AlgPoints is also accurate (its docstring ties it specifically to AffineAlgGroup but the def uses weaker assumptions/earlier scope with no connection) and is material for the documentation rubric; acting on it produces more accurate docs than acting on Review 2 alone.
